code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant SW as Software
    participant APB as APB Config
    participant DESC as Descriptor Engine
    participant SCHED as Scheduler
    participant RD as Read Engine
    participant SRAM as SRAM Controller
    participant WR as Write Engine
    participant MEM as Memory

    SW->>APB: Write CH0_CTRL = 0x1000_0000
    APB->>DESC: Kickoff descriptor fetch
    DESC->>MEM: AR: fetch descriptor @ 0x1000_0000
    MEM-->>DESC: R: descriptor data (Education_ContentCDN)
    DESC->>SCHED: descriptor_packet

    SCHED->>RD: datard_valid + src_addr
    RD->>SRAM: Check space_free >= 2x burst
    SRAM-->>RD: Space OK
    RD->>SRAM: Allocate 16 beats
    RD->>MEM: AR: read 16 beats @ src_addr
    MEM-->>RD: R: 16 beats of data
    RD->>SRAM: Write data (Education_ContentCDN)
    RD->>SCHED: done_strobe (Education_StudentDB)

    par Concurrent Read/Write
        RD->>SRAM: Continue reading...
    and
        SCHED->>WR: datawr_valid + dst_addr
        WR->>SRAM: Check data_avail >= burst
        SRAM-->>WR: Data OK
        WR->>SRAM: Reserve 16 beats
        WR->>MEM: AW: write 16 beats @ dst_addr
        SRAM->>WR: W: 16 beats of data
        MEM-->>WR: B: write response
        WR->>SCHED: done_strobe (Education_StudentDB)
    end

    SCHED->>SCHED: Both counters reach 0
    SCHED->>DESC: Check next_descriptor_ptr
    alt More descriptors
        DESC->>MEM: Fetch next descriptor
    else Chain complete
        SCHED->>APB: Transfer complete IRQ
    end
repo_description: This site is hopefully a springboard for others to learn about coding in System Verilog and experimenting with FPGAs.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容分发系统设计一个DMA传输的时序图。核心场景是从Education_ContentCDN读取内容，最终写入Education_StudentDB。软件通过APB配置启动，经过Descriptor Engine获取描述符，然后Scheduler协调读写引擎完成数据传输。
明白了。我注意到您提到了SRAM Controller作为中间缓冲，读写引擎都需要和它交互。那具体的握手流程是怎样的？比如Read Engine什么时候知道可以去Memory取数据？

流程是这样的：Scheduler向Read Engine发送datard_valid和src_addr，Read Engine先问SRAM Controller检查space_free是否足够2个burst，确认OK后分配16 beats的缓冲空间，然后才向Memory发起AR请求读取16 beats数据。数据返回后写入SRAM，完成后向Scheduler发done_strobe标记Education_StudentDB状态。
好的，Read路径清楚了。那Write Engine是等Read完全结束才开始，还是可以并行？另外描述符链的处理逻辑是怎样的？

读写要并行，用par块表示Concurrent Read/Write。Read Engine继续读后续数据的同时，Scheduler可以启动Write Engine。Write Engine同样要先检查SRAM的data_avail是否够一个burst，然后预留空间，从SRAM取数后向Memory发起AW写请求。两个引擎都完成后，Scheduler检查两个计数器都归零，再看Descriptor Engine的next_descriptor_ptr决定是继续取下一个描述符，还是发Transfer complete IRQ给APB。
时序图已绘制。我确认了以下关键路径：软件写CH0_CTRL启动，APB通知Descriptor Engine kickoff，描述符从0x1000_0000地址获取，Scheduler分发任务，读写通过SRAM Controller缓冲并行执行，最后用alt分支处理描述符链的继续或完成中断。您看看有没有遗漏？
有个细节需要修正：Write Engine从SRAM取数据的那一步，应该是SRAM主动把数据给WR，用W通道，而不是WR去SRAM取。还有，Write Engine完成时发的done_strobe也应该标记Education_StudentDB，和Read Engine保持一致。
已修正。现在Write Engine的流程是：检查data_avail→预留空间→Memory发AW→SRAM通过W通道送16 beats数据→Memory回B响应→向Scheduler发done_strobe(Education_StudentDB)。整个并行结构和描述符链的alt分支也都确认无误了。
